description_long: This is a decorative pedestrian bridge with a gently arched wooden deck and robust black railings. The bridge features four pairs of square pillars, each topped with a lantern-style lighting fixture, adding both safety and aesthetic appeal. The deck is composed of wooden planks, bordered by metallic or stone side panels that provide structural support. The railings are constructed from dark metal or painted wood, with evenly spaced vertical balusters and a smooth handrail. The bridge's arch is subtle but visually prominent, giving it an elegant, classical look suitable for parks or urban walkways. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, blending traditional and modern elements.
description: A gently arched pedestrian bridge with wooden planks, black railings, and lantern-topped pillars, combining classical and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the full arch, wooden deck, and all four pairs of lantern-topped pillars.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the curve of the bridge and the symmetry of the railings and pillars.
description_view_2: Rear-left view similar to the front but from the opposite side, showing the arch and pillar details.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the end of the bridge and the alignment of the deck and railings.
attribute_railing_design: black metal or painted wood railings with vertical balusters and smooth handrails, decorative lantern-topped pillars
attribute_lighting_fixtures: lantern-style lamp posts on each pillar
